channel.title: Hanapha Text Tools
channel.description: Free online text tools for writing, formatting, counting, converting, generating, editing, and analyzing text content quickly and easily.

item.title: Bio Generator
item.description: Generate creative and professional bios instantly online.

item.title: Case Converter
item.description: Convert text between uppercase, lowercase, title case, and more.

item.title: Emoji Remover
item.description: Remove emojis from text quickly and easily online.

item.title: Fancy Text Generator
item.description: Create stylish and fancy text fonts instantly online.

item.title: Gmail Dot Trick
item.description: Generate Gmail dot variations for email testing purposes.

item.title: Grammar Checker
item.description: Check grammar and spelling mistakes in text online.

item.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
item.description: Generate placeholder Lorem Ipsum text instantly.

item.title: Name Generator
item.description: Generate random names for projects, brands, or characters.

item.title: Plagiarism Checker
item.description: Check text originality and detect duplicate content online.

item.title: Random Text Generator
item.description: Generate random words, sentences, and text instantly.

item.title: Read Time Estimator
item.description: Estimate reading time for articles and written content.

item.title: Remove Duplicate Lines
item.description: Remove duplicate lines from text automatically online.

item.title: Remove Empty Lines
item.description: Clean text by removing unnecessary empty lines instantly.

item.title: Reverse Text
item.description: Reverse text characters, words, or sentences online.

item.title: Sentence Counter
item.description: Count sentences quickly and accurately online.

item.title: Text Diff Checker
item.description: Compare two text blocks and highlight differences instantly.

item.title: Text Repeater
item.description: Repeat text multiple times automatically online.

item.title: Typing Speed Test
item.description: Test typing speed and improve keyboard accuracy online.

item.title: Unicode Converter
item.description: Convert text into Unicode characters and formats easily.

item.title: Word Counter
item.description: Count words, characters, and text statistics online.
